description:
Stock Photos by Jessica Felicio, Alvin Balemesa, Clay Banks, Matthew Spiteri. Alice Muriithi, Zachary Nelson on Unsplash. 

Custom Lettering by Sofia Lesquerre

designer.description: I am a graphic designer with a keen interest in typography, layout and photography. Currently working freelance and open for new work!

html_data:
Let's celebrate!

Kwanzaa is a time of communal self-affirmation — when famous Black heroes and heroines, as well as late family members— are celebrated. It brings together the Black community not on the basis of their religious faith, but a shared cultural heritage.

Learn More

The event will take place in Event Location from 26th to 29th of December from 3PM to 9PM each day! Make sure to check our timeline before you get your ticket! Which will you pick?

All Access Pass

Get access to ALL days and all its activities + exclusive activities.

BUY NOW

VIP Access Pass

Get access to ALL days and all its activities + exclusive activities.

BUY NOW

What you'll see!

Check our program and don't miss anything!

Dance Activity

Sunday 26th, 4PM

Modern Rap

Monday 27th, 8PM

Music from us

Sunday 26th, 5PM

Dance Activity

Sunday 26th, 4PM

Artist Name

Monday 27th, 4PM

Music from us

Sunday 26th, 5PM

ALL ACTIVITIES

Meet us online!

Click on each image to get to know us and our participants!

FOLLOW US
 

Stay up-to-date with current activities and future events by following us on your favorite social media channels.

Changed your mind? Unsubscribe
